compose_yml:
services:
  sonarr:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/sonarr:latest
    container_name: sonarr
    env_file:
      - .env
    restart: unless-stopped

  caddy:
    image: ghcr.io/caddybuilds/caddy-cloudflare:latest
    container_name: arr-caddy
    env_file:
      - .env
    volumes:
      - ./Caddyfile:/etc/caddy/Caddyfile:ro
    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "443:443"
    restart: unless-stopped
